nasb.text: He searched, beginning with the oldest and ending with the youngest, and the cup was found in Benjamin’s sack.

esv.text: And he searched, beginning with the eldest and ending with the youngest. And the cup was found in Benjamin’s sack.

cnv.text: 管家就搜查，從最大的開始，查到最小的。那杯竟在便雅憫的布袋裡搜出來了。

ccb.text: 管家就从最年长的开始搜查，最后在便雅悯的口袋里搜出了银杯。

csbs.text: 管家就搜查，从年长的开始，到最小的为止；结果，那杯子在本雅明的袋子里找到了。
